programme.title: UFC
programme.desc: Conor McGregor v Max Holloway. Action from the welterweight bout at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada, plus the undercard for UFC 329.

programme.title: UFC: The Ultimate Fighter
programme.desc: MMA fighters train and compete against each other for a contract with the UFC, coached by Daniel Cormier and Michael Bisping.

programme.title: FIM Speedway Grand Prix Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the sixth round of the season in Malilla, Sweden.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Sydney Swans v Adelaide Crows.

programme.desc: Action from the first day of the 2026 NTI Townsville 500.

programme.desc: Action from the second day of the 2026 NTI Townsville 500.

programme.title: Live: BMX Racing
programme.desc: Coverage from the first day of the latest event of the season, which takes place at Brisbane, Australia.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series Review
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 La Thuile Enduro in Italy.

programme.title: MLB
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 All Star Game.

programme.desc: Collingwood Magpies v Carlton Blues (Bounce-up 10.35am). Coverage of the match from Melbourne Cricket Ground.

programme.title: Live AFL
programme.desc: West Coast Eagles v Brisbane Lions (Bounce-up 11.10am). Coverage of the match from Optus Stadium in Perth.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Action from the third ODI in the five-match series from Providence Cricket Stadium in Guyana.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Seattle Reign v Portland Thorns.

programme.desc: Gotham FC v Seattle Reign (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of the match from Icahn Stadium in New York.

programme.title: Live: NWSL
programme.desc: Denver Summit v Portland Thorns (Kick-off 7.00pm). Coverage of the match from Centennial Stadium in Denver.

programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.desc: Action from the 14th stage of the Grand Tour race.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 5 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.desc: Action from race one of the fifth round of the season at Brands Hatch.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball action from the NBA Summer League.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball action from the NBA Summer League.

programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: The 2026 ESPYS
programme.desc: Top celebrities from sports and entertainment come together to commemorate the past year by recognizing major athletic achievements, reliving unforgettable moments, and saluting the leading performers and performances; Marcello Hernández hosts.

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: 2026 AKC Diving Dogs Team Challenge
programme.desc: Eight elite teams of six dogs compete in a bracket-style format in distance jumping and air retrieve. From Philadelphia.

programme.title: Live: Athletes Unlimited Softball League
programme.desc: From Parkway Bank Sports Complex in Rosemont, Ill.

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: Dubbed by critics as the Doping Olympics, the first ever Enhanced Games take place in Las Vegas; it is an event where athletes taking PEDs compete for world records and millions in prize money.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball action from the NBA Summer League.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 1
programme.desc: Following a football team in the highlands of Ireland made of members of the same family who speak a language that none of their opponents understand.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 2
programme.desc: In Copsa Mica, the pollution created by industrial activity has impacted the health of the local team and forced them to transplant a football pitch from a nearby village.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 3
programme.desc: With a cemetery behind one of the goals, this is where players of Vilar de Barrio play. The clay pitch is described as the 'worst in Spain' and the coach is running for mayor.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 4
programme.desc: In Ireland, a home captain recounts the previous night's Christmas party, and a tight and terrible game ends with the captain getting told off by his mother.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 5
programme.desc: Witness the remarkable journey of the one-armed goalkeeper who has defied all odds and refuses to give up.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 6
programme.desc: On the Arctic Circle, a special annual match unfolds, where 86-year-old players from neighboring villages battle it out for one last time.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at the best of the action from the UFC 278 rematch between Kamaru Usman and Leon Edwards as they fought in Salt Lake City, Utah, USA for the welterweight title.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: Israel Adesanya v Kelvin Gastelum at UFC 236.

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the eighth round of the season at Donington Park Circuit.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 5 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at the 2016 London ePrix at Battersea Park Street Circuit.

programme.title: WRC: More Than Machine
programme.desc: Series following members of the M-Sport WRC team about the trials and tribulations of competing in rally driving at the highest level.

programme.title: World Rally Championship
programme.desc: Action from the first day of the Rally Estonia.

programme.desc: The Rally Estonia. Coverage from special stages eight and nine of the ninth round of the season, which takes place in Tartu County.

programme.desc: Action from rounds six and seven at Circuit Paul Ricard in Le Castellet.

programme.desc: The most exciting moments from the eighth round of the season at Donington Park Circuit in the United Kingdom.

programme.desc: A look back at the best of the action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Germany.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Philadelphia Phillies v New York Mets (Start-time 9.05pm). Coverage of the National League East match from Citizens Bank Park. This is the second match in a three-game series between the teams, and the last series involving them saw the Phillies win two of three contests at Citi Field.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Orioles take on the Astros at Daikin Park in Game 1 of a three-game series. Baltimore swept Kansas City while Houston enters this match up only one win against Texas in a three-game series. Yordan Alvarez leads the Astros with 31 home runs.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox and the Toronto Blue Jays meet at Rogers Centre for Game 2 of a three-game series. Colson Montgomery leads Chicago for the most home runs, while Kazuma Okamoto leads Toronto for most home runs and highest runs batted in.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Los Angeles Dodgers meet the New York Yankees at Yankee Stadium to open a three-game series. Shohei Ohtani leads the Dodgers in home runs and batting average, while Ben Rice leads the Yankees in home runs, batting average and runs batted in.

programme.title: Live: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.desc: Counting down the top 100 plays from the past year in the MLB.

programme.desc: A young expansion team grows from snowy underdogs to contenders as Dave Stieb defines the Blue Jays origin story.

programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox and the Toronto Blue Jays meet at Rogers Centre for Game 2 of a three-game series. Colson Montgomery leads Chicago for the most home runs, while Kazuma Okamoto leads Toronto for most home runs and highest runs batted in.

programme.title: Blue Jays Classics
programme.desc: World Series Game 6. From Oct. 23, 1993.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The L.A. Dodgers play the New York Yankees in Game 2 of a three-game series at Yankee Stadium. Designated hitter Shohei Ohtani leads the Dodgers in home runs and batting average. Ben Rice leads the Yankees in home runs, batting average and RBIs.

programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Nottingham, Hamilton Park, Newmarket and Pontefract.

programme.desc: Ella McNeill travels to Ireland to visit Pat Flynn and Andrew Slattery, gets the latest on Tipperary's redevelopment and tries her hand at hurling!

programme.desc: A preview of the day's racing with live news from the courses.

programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Market Rasen, Newmarket, Cartmel, Nottingham and the Curragh.

programme.desc: The Racing TV team reviews today's action-packed day on the track.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Pirates play the Guardians in Game 1 of a three-game series at Progressive Field. Pittsburgh are fresh off a series sweep against Milwaukee while Cleveland swept the series against Miami. Brandon Lowe leads Pittsburgh with 21 home runs.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Pirates play the Guardians in Game 1 of a three-game series at Progressive Field. Pittsburgh are fresh off a series sweep against Milwaukee while Cleveland swept the series against Miami. Brandon Lowe leads Pittsburgh with 21 home runs.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
programme.desc: Graham gets a true taste of Florida with Gov. Ron DeSantis. After a stop at the Governor's Mansion, they trek into the Everglades for a python hunt. DeSantis also opens up about personal tragedy and the scrutiny surrounding his administration.

programme.title: Ultimate Frisbee Association
programme.desc: From Highmark Stadium in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Pirates play the Guardians in Game 1 of a three-game series at Progressive Field. Pittsburgh are fresh off a series sweep against Milwaukee while Cleveland swept the series against Miami. Brandon Lowe leads Pittsburgh with 21 home runs.

programme.title: Fairways of Life With Matt Adams
programme.desc: NY Times Best Selling Author and Golf Channel's Matt Adams brings you inside the ropes where you'll get all the headlines, exclusive interviews with all of golf's stars, equipment updates, instruction for your game and so much more.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live: Saturday At The Open
programme.desc: On Saturday at the 154th Open Championship, the third round at Royal Birkdale awaits. Look ahead to all the play on an action-packed day three of the age-old competition.

programme.title: Live T20 Blast: Semi Final 1
programme.desc: Vitality Blast Finals Day gets underway with the opening semi-final.

programme.title: Live Belgian F1 GP: Qualifying
programme.desc: The starting grid for Sunday's Belgian Grand Prix at Spa is set with Formula 1 qualifying as the drivers look to battle their way through to Q3 for a shot at pole position.

programme.title: Live The Open: Round 3
programme.desc: The third round of the 154th Open Championship, staged at Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Live T20 Blast Finals
programme.desc: The 2026 edition of Vitality Blast Finals Day concludes as a champion is crowned.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: Join four of Fly Fusion's editors as they float down one of British Columbia's most renowned and scenic rivers while grappling with why it is they've dedicated their lives to this unique pastime.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Jeff Parks makes his way to the Gander River fishing with Gander River Outfitters searching for Atlantic Salmon.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: Chef Rupert prepares pulled Elk Empanadas with Japanese BBQ sauce.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Classic vessels at the Vintage Boat Show in Gravenhurst, Ont., include a 1925 Neptune, a 1949 Shepherd and a 1935 triple cockpit Seabird.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Celebrating Canada Day fishing at Port Eliza Lodge.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Host Mike Mitchell and Kevin Estrada, owner of Sturgeon Slayers, fish the mighty Fraser River, purposely targeting juvenile sturgeon for tagging before going in search of a monster.

programme.title: Fishing the Rock
programme.desc: Mackerel.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: Join four of Fly Fusion's editors as they float down one of British Columbia's most renowned and scenic rivers while grappling with why it is they've dedicated their lives to this unique pastime.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Jeff Parks makes his way to the Gander River fishing with Gander River Outfitters searching for Atlantic Salmon.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: Chef Rupert prepares pulled Elk Empanadas with Japanese BBQ sauce.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Classic vessels at the Vintage Boat Show in Gravenhurst, Ont., include a 1925 Neptune, a 1949 Shepherd and a 1935 triple cockpit Seabird.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Celebrating Canada Day fishing at Port Eliza Lodge.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Host Mike Mitchell and Kevin Estrada, owner of Sturgeon Slayers, fish the mighty Fraser River, purposely targeting juvenile sturgeon for tagging before going in search of a monster.

programme.title: Fishing the Rock
programme.desc: Mackerel.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: Join four of Fly Fusion's editors as they float down one of British Columbia's most renowned and scenic rivers while grappling with why it is they've dedicated their lives to this unique pastime.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Jeff Parks makes his way to the Gander River fishing with Gander River Outfitters searching for Atlantic Salmon.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: Chef Rupert prepares pulled Elk Empanadas with Japanese BBQ sauce.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Classic vessels at the Vintage Boat Show in Gravenhurst, Ont., include a 1925 Neptune, a 1949 Shepherd and a 1935 triple cockpit Seabird.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Celebrating Canada Day fishing at Port Eliza Lodge.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Host Mike Mitchell and Kevin Estrada, owner of Sturgeon Slayers, fish the mighty Fraser River, purposely targeting juvenile sturgeon for tagging before going in search of a monster.

programme.title: Fishing the Rock
programme.desc: Mackerel.

programme.title: Facts of Fishing
programme.desc: Dave hunts for giant smallmouth on the St. Lawrence River, but he's fishing a bite that most people avoid.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Trolling for Lake Michigan trout and salmon at Sturgeon Bay, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: The first-ever AWWS NXT Pro Guide Walleye Series on Lake Mille Lacs, MN.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Young Captain Reed Tudor hosts Captain Mike in Duck Key, FL and puts him on Micro Tarpon, Redfish and Goliath Grouper.

programme.title: Angling Edge Adventures
programme.desc: Angling Edge Adventures puts destination fishing front and center, traveling to world-class waters across the Midwest and Canada. Hosted by the Lindner team, each episode highlights outstanding fisheries while showing anglers how to break down new water and capitalize on peak seasonal opportunities. Grounded in the proven Angling Edge approach, the series blends travel, exploration, and real-world

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: By sea, or by land, wading or boating; when it comes to chasing the silver ghosts of the flats, the method depends on the day and conditions, and other times it's strictly personal preference.

programme.title: Arkansas Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Fort Smith hosts Pradco Outdoors creating lures which make great fishing memories. We tour and test the products! And Leigh's bluegrass tour continues.

programme.title: Fishing the Midwest
programme.desc: Lake Oahe and Lake Sharpe produce outstanding summer walleye fishing on this episode of Fishing the Midwest.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.desc: Host Mark Courts joins guest Mitch Anderson on a mission to find fall, shallow-water walleyes on jerkbaits.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Join Beau & Walker on an adventure they will never forget catching Specs & Bass out of Highland Park Fish Camp in DeLand, Florida.

programme.title: National Walleye Tour
programme.desc: National Walleye Tour anglers take on Lake Huron in Alpena, Michigan for the third stop of the season! Tune in to see which Pros & Co-Anglers take top honors.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy goes fishing with Twin Brothers in MO.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland and Barry Maner crawl Spro frogs across the grass mats of Lake Guntersville for big bass on a rainy day in October.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Jump in with Bill and his guest, Rex Nelson from KastKing as they search for lunkers in some very clear water.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Come along on this fun fishing adventure with Bill and country singer-songwriter Stephanie Quayle.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: Fishing the Islamorada back country with Capt. Matt Bellinger; George and Lain fight over food at Mangrove Mike's; chef Cat prepares a seared mahi-mahi with pineapple salsa recipe submitted by fan Helen Whitmer.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.desc: The Spear Life crew teams up with Captain Cameron Sebastian in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, to hunt trophy gag grouper on deep offshore wrecks before wrapping up the adventure with a fresh hook-and-cook.

programme.title: Julie Higgs Spearfishing
programme.desc: A lifelong spearfishing aficionado, Julie Higgs first discovered her passion while sailing aboard her family's sailboat in the Bahamas, where fish dinners caught by pole-spear were as much a tradition as a pastime. Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: George Poveromo fishes for mahi and yellowtails in the Keys.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Uncharted Waters With Peter Miller
programme.desc: Peter targets false albacore, known as albies, up off Cape Cod with Capt. Jack and Robbie. They stop by The Port Restaurant for some epic food with Peter's old pal and restaurateur, Griffin Brackett.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Exploring the fishing destinations and the subculture scene of salty characters that come along with it, we embody the local mentality, with boots on the ground.

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Follow Capt. George in search of fish and adventure.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: 2025 Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A Day 1 from Smith Mountain Lake in Franklin County, VA. Anglers compete to advance as well as $10,000 Big Bass Bonus.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Chasing rumors of double-digit bass, champion Chris Lane searches secret Alabama waters for monsters.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: A look at life behind the lens from the men that make it happen.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Pete Roberts is the visionary behind Origin USA, a company uncompromising in its promise to produce 100% American made products; to keep his promise, Pete must challenge the idea that manufacturing must be done overseas.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A hunting show for EVERYONE! Come enjoy our fast-paced and upbeat hunting show. Follow along with hosts Brandon Jennings, Sean Lundy, and John O'Dell as we travel all over the globe hunting multiple species, attempt to educate and entertain our viewers and focus on the one thing that matters most... Family.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Colorado, King partners with RSI Outdoors' owner, Tarry Bratton, and visits HARTEIS RANCH with Freddy, harvesting his first Colorado antelope.

programme.title: Hardcore Pursuit
programme.desc: Follow Mike Pelletier and the hearty gang of northern hunters as they chase whitetail deer, mule deer, elk, moose, bear, turkey and whatever else proves to be an exciting challenge all across North America during Season 18 of HARDCORE Pursuit.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: River Klass goes behind the scenes at the rodeo called the "Daddy of 'em All.".

programme.title: The Wild Outdoors
programme.desc: Heading to Iowa in springtime to chase turkeys with Wyatt and Jay.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Colorado, King partners with RSI Outdoors' owner, Tarry Bratton, and visits HARTEIS RANCH with Freddy, harvesting his first Colorado antelope.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Travis Price travels to British Columbia and flies into the backcountry to hunt for big moose and mountain goats.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A hunting show for EVERYONE! Come enjoy our fast-paced and upbeat hunting show. Follow along with hosts Brandon Jennings, Sean Lundy, and John O'Dell as we travel all over the globe hunting multiple species, attempt to educate and entertain our viewers and focus on the one thing that matters most... Family.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel—it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Elk Camp
programme.desc: Renowned elk caller and professional guide Steve Chappell guides his clients on up-close, bugling elk hunts in Arizona and Colorado. Steve's calling skills and capacity for understanding elk behavior are on display each week.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry meets up with Get Ducks' Ramsey Russell for an unreal duck hunting adventure in Argentina.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef and the crew head north to share camp with Brad Eldridge from Parish calls.

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: Join BVO Prostaffers Darren Tippit, Brannon Haro and Joe Bufford as they chase big whitetails in different parts of the country.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Tyler Weaver & Kenneth Lancaster return to the Brooks Range of Alaska, on a DIY caribou hunt.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Quail hunting with ladies behind the success of Southern Woods.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Mike Fishes the beautiful waters of Clearwater, FL for Trout and Redfish.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Tyler Weaver & Kenneth Lancaster return to the Brooks Range of Alaska, on a DIY caribou hunt.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Close range bow hunting in Old Mexico.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A hunting show for EVERYONE! Come enjoy our fast-paced and upbeat hunting show. Follow along with hosts Brandon Jennings, Sean Lundy, and John O'Dell as we travel all over the globe hunting multiple species, attempt to educate and entertain our viewers and focus on the one thing that matters most... Family.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario teams up with good friend and precision rifle expert Bernard and heads into the high alpine mountains above New Zealand's rugged West Coast in search of tahr; drawing on his Greek roots, Mario cooks a rustic Kleftiko dish in an earth oven.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: More than three decades after the Vietnam War, when the totals of modern American snipers were added up, it was discovered that one man had 103 confirmed kills and as many as 216 probable kills, more than any other Marine Corps sniper; host Joe Mantegna explores the life and accomplishments of Chuck Mawhinney.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking and hunting in Nepal.

programme.title: WildFed
programme.desc: Daniel heads out on a South Carolina gator hunt, then learns about an ancient American caffeine crop called Yaupon being rediscovered in Georgia.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Quail hunting with ladies behind the success of Southern Woods.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef and the crew head north to share camp with Brad Eldridge from Parish calls.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve takes Evan Felker, lead singer of Turnpike Troubadours, on his first Alaskan black bear hunt.

programme.title: Dirt Trax TV
programme.desc: The guys head to Hatfield McCoy for a little business retreat while also riding Big Coal River and Braveheart trail systems.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Three Purple Heart heroes join Mike and the Big Deer crew in Virginia. Part 2.

programme.title: Rooster Tales
programme.desc: Rooster Tales takes viewers on exciting upland bird hunting adventures across North America in search of wild birds in wild places. Host Travis Frank shares stories from the field about passionate bird hunters, bird dogs, habitat conservation, and DIY bird hunts on public land.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: DUTV Co-Host Fred Zink joins Kevin VanDam and his boys on the banks of the Neosho River in Kansas in the heart of the Central Flyway for a waterfowl experience that rekindles the values and the good that comes from spending time outdoors.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: RNT-V
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since John made the first J. Stephens calls, but his experience with the craft started way before then; from making calls inspired by call makers from the past to the formation of the J. Stephens Owners Group.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry meets up with Get Ducks' Ramsey Russell for an unreal duck hunting adventure in Argentina.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather Douville reconnects with her Tlingit heritage through teachings from her father, Mike Douville; a recognition of the critical need to safeguard traditional food sources and maintain ecosystem balance.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather harvests a seal during the herring spawn to make seal oil and to share traditional foods with her community.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: During the herring spawn, Mike continues the long tradition of passing down generational knowledge to Heather, ensuring she can share this knowledge with her community now and in the future.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather and Mike will demonstrate the cultural importance of Náxw, the traditional wooden halibut hooks used by Tlingit people for centuries.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Mike and Heather beach seine to catch salmon, which they then prepare in a variety of ways to distribute among their community and family.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: With the arrival of shorter days and cooler temperatures, Heather finishes the year by successfully harvesting a deer before retreating back into her fur shop to sew.

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Laramy realizes that game is scarce because of the wolves, and he decides to put some distance between himself and the pack. Time to break down camp and move to a new location.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: It's the bear opener in Minnesota and Buddy Toepfer has waited five years for the chance to shoot a big one; Buddy's got a buddy who just happens to have a bear or two on his property.

programme.title: Trijicon's World of Sports Afield
programme.desc: Hosted by international big game hunter Dave Fulson, Trijicon's World Of Sports Afield takes the viewer around the globe in search of big game adventure. From the rugged Yukon, to the windswept mountains of North America and Asia, to the great game fields of Africa, this series delivers world-class hunting in each episode!

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Storied programs in the No. 13 Longhorns and the No. 18 Wolverines line up in the Citrus Bowl from Orlando, Fla. Both sides are 9-3. The schools meet for the third time after the Longhorns defeated the Wolverines 31-12 in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cardinal clash with the Cougars from Provo, Utah. Stanford has been off since Aug. 23, when it lost its season opener 23-20 to Hawaii on a last-second field goal. BYU smoked Portland State 69-0 on Aug. 30. BYU took down Stanford 35-26 in 2022.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cougars clash with the Pirates. East Carolina has outscored its opposition 94-3 during its two-game win streak. BYU is 2-0, outscoring foes 96-3. East Carolina stunned BYU 27-24 with a game-winning field goal as time expired on Oct. 28, 2022.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 25 Cougars begin their Big 12 slate with a game against the Buffaloes at Folsom Field. With Kaidon Salter back at starting quarterback, Colorado dumped Wyoming 37-20 to improve to 2-2 on Sept. 20. BYU is 3-0 for the third straight season.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by North Carolina Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 UNC Tar Heels.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by SMU Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 SMU Mustangs.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cougars (5-0, 2-0 Big 12) try for their fifth straight victory over the Wildcats (4-1, 1-1). BYU is 5-0 for the fourth time in six years following a 38-24 win over West Virginia. Arizona quarterback Noah Fifita has accounted for 16 touchdowns.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: A clash of Big 12 elites sees the No. 8 Red Raiders (8-1, 5-1) host the No. 7 Cougars (8-0, 5-0). Both sides boast a ranked win over Utah this year, with Texas Tech prevailing 34-10 on the road Sept. 20 and BYU grinding out a 24-21 home win Oct. 18.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 12 Cougars (8-1, 5-1 Big 12) try to bounce back when they host the Horned Frogs (6-3, 3-3). TCU has won five in a row over BYU after a 44-11 result in 2023 in their first meeting since 2011. BYU fell 29-7 at then-No. 8 Texas Tech on Nov. 8.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 11 Cougars host the Knights in a regular-season finale. BYU is in the driver's seat for its first Big 12 title-game appearance after holding off Cincinnati in Week 13. LJ Martin ran for 101 yards and a touchdown to help BYU beat UCF in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 4 Red Raiders and No. 11 Cougars make their debuts in the Big 12 title game. Both teams are 11-1. Texas Tech beat BYU 29-7 in November. The Raiders held the Cougars to 67 rushing yards in that contest, well below their 194.5 season average.

programme.title: Live: Baseball Night in N.Y.
programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: Live: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From NBT Bank Stadium in Syracuse, N.Y.

programme.title: Mets Yearbook
programme.desc: Highlights of the New York Mets season.

programme.title: Doc 16
programme.desc: SNY's coverage of the Mets jersey retirement ceremony for Dwight "Doc" Gooden. The ceremony took place on April 14th, 2024 at Citi Field, celebrating his 11-year career with the Mets.

programme.title: Mets Yearbook
programme.desc: Highlights of the New York Mets season.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.desc: Ideal Prostate is the only Prostate Formula with a patented blend to relieve both PROSTATE & BLADDER Symptoms. Tune in for a Special TV offer!

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at the obscure, oddball, and twisted stories in New York sports from 2000.

programme.title: The Wright Way
programme.desc: To honor one of the most beloved players in Mets history, SNY presents a special original documentary celebrating the legacy of David Wright. From his earliest days in Queens to his rise as team captain and fan favorite.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Riverdale Dunes is a top-rated, Scottish-style course set next to the South Platte River; learn about course amenities and events, and get tips to improve your game.

programme.title: 18 Holes With Natalie Gulbis and Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Jimmy Hanlin and Natalie Gulbis showcase some of the best golf destinations.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Major League Fishing All Angles
programme.desc: All Angles inside look at the MLF Team Series 2025 Challenge Cup Knockout Match 1 with angler commentary.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: 18 Holes With Natalie Gulbis and Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Jimmy Hanlin and Natalie Gulbis showcase some of the best golf destinations.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Green Valley Ranch Golf Club hosts the Colorado Open Championships and features a full range practice facility in addition to its courses.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 1916 Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Own the first-ever Gold issue of the legendary 1916 Mercury Dime today. This special 2026 Gold Mercury Dime comes with a bonus Silver Medal, both dated 1916 in tribute to the classic coin and graded Perfect 70 condition in exclusive holders!

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.
